title: The Sonos Ace are a hefty 25 percent for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
summary: Sonos Ace noise-canceling headphones are discounted 25% to $299 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, offering high-quality sound and the unique TV Audio Swap feature that lets users instantly transfer sound from Sonos soundbars.
content:
Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale might be a great opportunity to pick up a color ebook reader or an RGB-equipped table lamp, but the pickings are slimmer when it comes to noise-canceling headphones. Sure, the Sony WH-1000XM6 are just over $60 off, though I’d argue the Sonos Ace are a better deal, given they’re currently on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Sonos’ online storefront for a cool $299 ($100).
Sonos Ace

Where to Buy:

 $399 $299 at Amazon
 $399 $299 at Best Buy
 $399 $299 at Sonos

The Sonos Ace are a great product that came at the wrong time. The company’s app crisis pretty much overshadowed their debut in 2024, which is a shame considering they’re a gorgeous pair of over-ear headphones with powerful, detailed sound and a comfortable design that lets you easily swap the ear pads. Sound-wise, you can expect something on par with what you might get from a pair of Bose or Apple headphones, with a natural-sounding transparency mode that’s really only second to the original AirPods Max (no word on the Max 2).
The biggest downside to the Ace is that you can’t play music over Wi-Fi or group them with the company’s in-home speakers (although they do support wired audio over USB-C). However, for me, the fact that they can leverage Sonos’ TV Audio Swap feature is what makes them a standout. The unique tool allows you to instantly transfer the sound from a Sonos soundbar — including the Sonos Arc, the entry-level Sonos Ray, and both iterations of the Sonos Beam — to either one or two pairs of the Ace with the simple press of a button. You can also trigger the feature within the Sonos app, which lets you enable spatial audio and head tracking for a fuller, more cinematic experience.
Admittedly, TV Audio Swap is only going to appeal to those already tapped into the Sonos ecosystem. That said, I routinely use the feature to listen while watching movies and gaming (with minimal lag!), mostly so I don’t disturb folks in my household who might be sleeping. Sonos’ newer

title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
summary: Amazon's Big Spring Sale running through March 31 offers deals on smart home devices, electronics, and accessories at prices matching their lowest points this year, providing relief from tariff-driven increases.
content:
Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which starts today and runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until Prime Day surfaces at the onset of summer.
The bulk of the deals we’re seeing right now aren’t quite on par with Black Friday or Prime Day, and, as with most shopping events, not everything on sale is worth picking up. That said, Amazon’s latest sale is one of the first big opportunities we’ve seen this year to save — and bypass some tariff-induced pain — especially since some of our favorite gadgets are currently matching their lowest prices to date, including headphones, robot vacuums, and a slew of charging accessories.
To help you sift through it all, we’re focusing squarely on the gadgets that are actually worth picking up, many of which we’ve tested and recommend even at full price. You’re not limited to Amazon, either. Retailers like Best Buy and Walmart are offering the same deals in a lot of cases, meaning you don’t necessarily need to succumb to shopping at the so-called “Everything Store” just to save a buck (or 50).
Smart home deals
Echo Show 8 (2025)
The updated Echo Show 8 features an 8.7-inch display with 720p resolution, wider viewing angles, and higher contrast. It includes a 13-megapixel camera, new stereo speakers, and supports Alexa Plus, while doubling as a smart home hub with support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread. Read our review.

title: The portable Fanttik X9 Pro tire inflator is down to its best price in months
summary: The Fanttik X9 Pro portable tire inflator is on sale for $59.98 ($20 off) during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, matching its best price since July, and can inflate car tires in about a minute with up to 150 PSI capacity.
content:
Fanttik’s X9 Pro is $20 off, which is its best price since July. | Image: Fanttik	

If you’ve ever had to deal with a flat tire, you know how quickly it can derail your day. That’s why it’s worth considering a portable inflator like the Fanttik X9 Pro. The small, rechargeable air pump that can quickly inflate tires on cars and bikes is down to $59.98 ($20 off) at Amazon and directly from Fantikk as a part of Amazon’s Big Spring sale. This sale price is the best we’ve seen since July.
Fanttik X9 Pro Portable Tire Inflator

Where to Buy:

 $79.97 $59.98 at Amazon (with on-page coupon)
 $79.97 $59.98 at Fanttik (with code X9PRO1)
 $79.99 at Best Buy

Fanttik’s portable pump can inflate a compact car tire from 30 to 35 PSI in about a minute, and with a maximum pressure of 150 PSI, it works with everything from SUVs and bikes to sports balls. Using it is simple; pull out its air hose, attach it to your tire (or other inflatable doodad), then select from one of the four preset modes for cars, motorcycles, bikes, and balls — or switch to manual if you want more control. The built-in display shows your tire’s pressure in real time, your selected target level, and remaining battery life, so you can easily track progress on the most important metrics. It also automatically shuts off when it’s done, so there’s no need to keep checking it. 
Weighing in at about a pound, the X9 Pro should be easy to carry, and its slim design includes built-in storage for accessories (it comes with adapters for different valve types). Its battery recharges via USB-C and can run continuously for up to 23 minutes.

title: Spotify is letting artists manually approve releases to combat AI fakes
summary: Spotify is beta-testing Artist Profile Protection, a feature allowing artists to manually approve releases before publication to prevent AI-generated fakes and impostor tracks from appearing on their profiles.
content:
Spotify is beta-testing a new feature called Artist Profile Protection that lets artists review releases before they go live. Sometimes songs end up on the wrong artist pages because of metadata mixups or shared names. But increasingly, artists have been targeted by impostors and AI-generated fakes. Profile Protection offers a buffer against bad actors.
Everyone from Drake and Beyonce, to experimental composers like William Basinski, and indie rock acts like King Gizzard and the Lizard Wizard have had fake tracks appear under their names on streaming platforms, with some that were likely AI-generated. It's an issue that has stoked a lot of  …

The Omega Speedmaster Professional, worn by Buzz Aldrin during the Apollo 11 lunar landing, is the most recognized watch to go to space. But the Seiko Rotocall, featuring a unique design that made it easier to switch between the watch's various modes, could be a close second. Seiko has resurrected and rereleased the watch used by several NASA astronauts up until 2002, including Sally Ride. The new version has a slightly updated design, but it carries forward the same basic LCD display and functionality as the original.
The original version of the Seiko Rotocall debuted in 1982 for $125. The new version, available in three versions called th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

content:
Anthropic has launched an "auto mode" for Claude Code, a new tool that lets AI make permissions-level decisions on users' behalf. The company says the feature offers vibe coders  a safer alternative between constant handholding or giving the model dangerous levels of autonomy. 
Claude Code is capable of acting independently on users' behalf, a useful but risky feature as it can also do things users don't want, like deleting files, sending out sensitive data, and executing malicious code or hidden instructions. Auto mode is designed to prevent this, flagging and blocking potentially risky actions before they run and offering the agent a chan …

title: The BB-777 is the ultimate in boombox nostalgia

content:
Scooby Doo. | Image: Bumpboxx	

Bumpboxx is fully embracing nostalgia with its latest boombox, the BB-777, which is modeled very closely on the legendary Sharp GF-777. A real deal GF-777 will set you back over $2,000 for one in working order. Plus, that vintage unit lacks modern amenities like Bluetooth or a rechargeable battery. Heck, it doesn't even have a CD player. 
The BB-777 takes the core of the GF, right down to the dual-cassette decks, control layout, and speaker specs printed above the subwoofers. It's undeniably a gorgeous piece of gear with its vintage silver finish and extensive physical controls. But then it adds a replaceable battery pack, Bluetooth, and an …

de.summary: Kleiner Perkins sammelte 3,5 Milliarden Dollar an frischem Kapital mit klarem Fokus auf KI-Investitionen, wobei 1 Milliarde Dollar für Early-Stage-Startups und 2,5 Milliarden Dollar für Late-Stage-Wachstumsunternehmen bereitgestellt wurde. Das erhebliche Engagement des Fonds unterstreicht den Glauben der Venture-Capital-Industrie an das transformative Potenzial von KI.

es.title: Con $3.5B en nuevo capital, Kleiner Perkins apuesta todo a la IA
es.summary: Kleiner Perkins recaudó $3.5 mil millones en nuevo capital con un enfoque claro en inversiones de IA, asignando $1 mil millones para startups en etapa inicial y $2.5 mil millones para empresas en crecimiento tardío. El compromiso sustancial del fondo subraya la creencia de la industria de capital de riesgo en el potencial transformador de la IA.

title: New Mexico just handed Meta its first courtroom defeat over child safety, and the rest of the country is watching
summary: Meta faced its first jury verdict on child safety when a New Mexico court found the company willfully misled users about product safety. The landmark ruling signals potential regulatory pressure on Meta nationwide regarding child protection.
content: The dollar amount isn’t as important as the fact that this is the first jury verdict of its kind against Meta over harm to young people.

zh.title: 新墨西哥州刚刚给Meta带来了首次儿童安全法庭败诉,整个国家都在关注
zh.summary: Meta在儿童安全方面面临首次陪审团裁决,新墨西哥州法院发现该公司故意误导用户有关产品安全。这一里程碑式的裁决预示着可能对Meta在全国范围内的儿童保护方面进行监管压力。

fr.title: Le Nouveau-Mexique vient d'infliger à Meta sa première défaite au tribunal sur la sécurité des enfants, et tout le pays regarde
fr.summary: Meta a fait face à son premier verdict de jury sur la sécurité des enfants lorsqu'un tribunal du Nouveau-Mexique a découvert que l'entreprise avait délibérément trompé les utilisateurs sur la sécurité des produits. Cette décision historique signale une pression réglementaire potentielle sur Meta au niveau national concernant la protection des enfants.

de.title: Neumexiko hat Meta gerade seine erste Gerichtsschlappe bei der Kindersicherheit eingebrockt, und das ganze Land schaut zu
de.summary: Meta stand seinem ersten Geschworenenurteil zur Kindersicherheit gegenüber, als ein Gericht in Neumexiko feststellte, dass das Unternehmen Benutzer absichtlich über die Produktsicherheit getäuscht hatte. Das Urteil signalisiert mögliche regulatorische Auswirkungen auf Meta landesweit in Bezug auf Kinderschutz.

es.title: Nuevo México acaba de infligir a Meta su primera derrota en la corte sobre seguridad infantil, y todo el país está mirando
es.summary: Meta enfrentó su primer veredicto de jurado sobre seguridad infantil cuando un tribunal de Nuevo México encontró que la empresa engañó deliberadamente a los usuarios sobre la seguridad del producto. El fallo histórico señala una posible presión regulatoria en Meta a nivel nacional con respecto a la protección infantil.

title: Lululemon bets Epoch Biodesign can eat its shorts, literally
summary: Lululemon is backing Epoch Biodesign, a startup using enzymes to break plastic waste into chemical building blocks for new plastic production. The investment represents a circular economy approach to sustainability in the fashion industry.
content: Startup Epoch Biodesign uses enzymes to break plastic waste down into monomers, the chemical building blocks that can be used to make new plastic.

zh.title: 露露柠檬赌博Epoch Biodesign可以吃掉它的短裤,字面上
zh.summary: 露露柠檬支持Epoch Biodesign,这是一家使用酶将塑料废料分解成新塑料生产化学基础的初创公司。这项投资代表了时装业可持续性的循环经济方法。

fr.title: Lululemon parie qu'Epoch Biodesign peut manger ses shorts, littéralement
fr.summary: Lululemon soutient Epoch Biodesign, une startup qui utilise des enzymes pour décomposer les déchets plastiques en blocs de construction chimiques pour la production de nouveau plastique. L'investissement représente une approche d'économie circulaire pour la durabilité dans l'industrie de la mode.

de.title: Lululemon wettet, dass Epoch Biodesign seine Shorts aufessen kann, buchstäblich
de.summary: Lululemon unterstützt Epoch Biodesign, ein Startup, das Enzyme verwendet, um Kunststoffabfälle in chemische Bausteine für die Neukunststoffproduktion zu zerlegen. Die Investition stellt einen Kreislaufwirtschaftsansatz für Nachhaltigkeit in der Modebranche dar.

es.title: Lululemon apuesta a que Epoch Biodesign pueda comerse sus pantalones cortos, literalmente
es.summary: Lululemon respalda a Epoch Biodesign, una startup que utiliza enzimas para descomponer residuos plásticos en bloques de construcción químicos para la producción de plástico nuevo. La inversión representa un enfoque de economía circular para la sostenibilidad en la industria de la moda.
